PM2._note: PTEN VCEP: stricter PM2 threshold (1/200,000) reflecting low background

BA1._note: BA1 lowered to 0.001 for PTEN (small case-control disequilibrium)

PP3._note: PTEN VCEP uses REVEL >= 0.7 for PP3 (more permissive than generic 0.644)

_notes: Functional evidence (Mighell 2018 phosphatase activity DMS) feeds PS3 lookups.
